name: nangalkot-bazar-association
description: নাঙ্গলকোট বাজার ব্যবসায়ী সংস্থা — public businessmen directory + admin CMS (Next.js + Express + PostgreSQL)

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait db
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U nba -d nangalkot_bazar
scripts.bootstrap: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
